emails.subject: Re: deal 495264
emails.body: Re: deal 495264 Looks like Amerex has this in as a peak deal. Bob shows off-peak, says Amerex is incorrect. Please let me know if they dispute. Thanks, Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 01/11/2001 03:07 PM

emails.subject: deal 495264
emails.body: Bob Badeer deal 495264 Amerex shows 30400 total mw and we show 24800
